description_long: This is a modern three-seater sofa with a deep, rich reddish-brown seat and back cushions, paired with a contrasting black armrest structure on one side. The sofa features three large, plush, square back cushions that appear loose and are evenly spaced along the backrest. The seat is a single, thick cushion with a subtle grid-like stitched pattern, providing both comfort and visual interest. The left armrest is wide, flat, and extends the full depth of the sofa, incorporating built-in rectangular compartments for storage or holding items. The sofa stands on six light wooden legs, which are cylindrical and slightly tapered, providing sturdy support and a touch of Scandinavian design. The overall look is contemporary, functional, and well-suited for urban environments such as parks, lobbies, or communal outdoor spaces.
description: A contemporary three-seater sofa with reddish-brown cushions, a wide black armrest with storage compartments, and light wooden legs, blending comfort and modern design.
description_view_0: Front view showing three plush reddish-brown back cushions, a single seat cushion, and the wide black armrest with storage on the left.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the depth of the seat, the thickness of the cushions, and the full extension of the black armrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous black backrest structure, the alignment of the cushions, and the arrangement of the six wooden legs.
description_view_3: Right side view focusing on the black armrest's rectangular compartments and the sofa's overall profile.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three large, loose, square back cushions evenly spaced; single thick seat cushion with grid stitching; all cushions are uniform in size and unattached.
attribute_armrest_style: Single, wide, flat black armrest on the left side, extending the full depth of the sofa, with built-in rectangular storage compartments; no armrest on the right.
attribute_leg_design: Six cylindrical, light wooden legs; four at the corners and two central supports; legs are exposed, slightly tapered, and evenly spaced for stability.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight backrest formed by three individual, plush cushions; segmented and uniform with no visible tufting or channeling.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid reddish-brown fabric with a subtle grid-stitched pattern on the seat cushion; back cushions are smooth and unpatterned.
